raw_consumer_statement: I visited XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX DC XXXX XXXX between XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX 2025. I presented my American Express Delta skymiles credit card. After my visit the hotel charged me extra {$250.00} and then went ahead to charge another {$250.00} on my American Express Business platinum credit card, I never presented this card as a form of payment. How did they get my credit card information.
